name: Alex Rivera
technical_background: Basic scripting (Excel macros, Google Sheets formulas, simple automation). Comfortable with analytics dashboards and SQL for campaign reporting. No formal programming or ML experience.

current_profile.summary: Marketing Manager with 10 years of experience in consumer goods and retail marketing. Leads digital campaigns across paid, organic, and lifecycle marketing channels, managing a team of 4 marketing specialists. Strong stakeholder management skills, including presenting campaign ROI to executive leadership. Comfortable with analytics dashboards, basic SQL queries, and A/B testing for conversion optimization. Has evaluated AI-powered marketing tools for personalization and ad-tech but has not built AI systems or worked with model evaluation. Uses ChatGPT daily for copy variants, brainstorming, and campaign ideation.
technical_skills: Basic JSON/data feeds for ad platforms
soft_skills: Digital campaign leadership and team management
current_profile.ai_experience: Regular user of ChatGPT for copy variants, campaign ideation, and customer segmentation brainstorming. Has used Claude for longer research and competitive analysis tasks. Explored Canva AI for visual content generation. Comfortable writing basic prompts and evaluating AI outputs for marketing content, but has not built AI systems, worked with APIs, or conducted model evaluation. Has evaluated AI-powered personalization vendors but always as a buyer, never as a builder.

learning_intent: Wants to pivot into AI product work to future-proof her career and build products that combine customer insight with AI capabilities. Goal: become fluent enough in AI fundamentals to scope use cases, write product requirements for AI features, partner effectively with engineering and data science teams, and ship AI features responsibly. Interested in recommendation engines, content personalization, and intelligent customer segmentation as first product areas.

target_jd.title: AI Product Manager (GenAI features)
requirements: Own AI product roadmap: define vision, requirements, and success metrics for AI-enabled marketing features
Translate user needs into AI/ML features; collaborate with engineering and data science to build recommendation engines and content personalization
Define evaluation criteria, launch experiments, and iterate based on AI feature performance metrics
Partner with legal/compliance on privacy, IP, and responsible AI practices for consumer-facing AI
Map existing marketing workflows to identify high-ROI AI automation opportunities
Build and maintain AI product feedback loops with users and internal stakeholders
Evaluate and select third-party AI/ML capabilities for platform integration
Define release process and quality gates for AI features in production
Communicate AI strategy and feature capabilities to non-technical marketing stakeholders
Design explainability and transparency features for AI-driven personalization and recommendations

expected_skill_gaps.description: Move from general awareness to practical understanding of LLM fundamentals, limitations, and model selection. Understand privacy/IP/bias basics for GenAI products.
AI product workflow mapping, feedback-loop design for model improvements, and explainability UX for consumer-facing AI features.
Structured prompting with constraints, prompt debugging and iteration, and JSON/schema outputs for production integrations.
Define offline/online evals and release gates; interpret quality dashboards; understand A/B testing for AI features.
Map policies to controls; data retention and minimization in AI features; understand AI regulations landscape.
AI security threat landscape awareness and data leakage prevention for consumer-facing AI products.
Building systematic approaches to evaluating new AI tools and creating repeatable personal AI workflows.
Writing AI project proposals and communicating AI capabilities and limitations to non-technical marketing leadership.
